55975.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1490 : Don Cheadle / Cecily Strong / Musical Guest
55975.description: The long-running late-night talk show returns to New York for the first time since 1972 when comic Jimmy Fallon takes over hosting duties, accompanied by his Grammy-winning house band, The Roots. The former cast member of "Saturday Night Live" and lead of a later show welcomes guests to an evening of comedy, music, conversation and competitions. Lorne Michaels serves as the programme's executive producer.

56053.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1490 : Don Cheadle / Cecily Strong / Musical Guest
56053.description: From the heart of New York City, Jimmy Fallon is joined by Don Cheadle, Cecily Strong and musical guest BTS.
